title: crotalaria boutiqueana
intro: Crotalaria boutiqueana, also known as the 'Palm-leaf Crotalaria', is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The seeds of Crotalaria boutiqueana are said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and promoting digestion. The seeds can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and creams.
